// List 3 - Essere conjugations
export const vocabDict3 = {
  'Io sono': 'I am',
  'Tu sei': 'You are (singular, informal)',
  'Lui/Lei è': 'He/She is',
  'Noi siamo': 'We are',
  'Voi siete': 'You are (plural, formal)',
  'Loro sono': 'They are'
};

// List 4 - Avere conjugations
export const vocabDict4 = {
  'Io ho': 'I have',
  'Tu hai': 'You have (singular, informal)',
  'Lui/Lei ha': 'He/She has',
  'Noi abbiamo': 'We have',
  'Voi avete': 'You have (plural, formal)',
  'Loro hanno': 'They have'
};

// List 5 - Regular -ARE verb endings (Presente)
export const vocabDict5 = {
  'io': 'o',
  'tu': 'i',
  'lui/lei': 'a',
  'noi': 'iamo',
  'voi': 'ate',
  'loro': 'ano'
};

// Grammar List - Indefinite Articles practice (prompt: noun -> answer: un/uno/una/un')
export const vocabIndefArticles = {
  // un (masculine, most consonants and vowels)
  'libro': 'un',
  'gatto': 'un',
  'coltello': 'un',
  'bicchiere': 'un',
  'panino': 'un',
  'gelato': 'un',
  'pomodoro': 'un',
  'limone': 'un',
  'orologio': 'un',
  'vino': 'un',
  'caffè': 'un',
  'pollo': 'un',
  'peperone': 'un',
  'cioccolato': 'un',
  'taxi': 'un',
  // uno (masculine before s+consonant, z, gn, ps, pn, x, y)
  'studente': 'uno',
  'zaino': 'uno',
  'psicologo': 'uno',
  'pneumatico': 'uno',
  'gnomo': 'uno',
  'xilofono': 'uno',
  'yogurt': 'uno',
  'sguardo': 'uno',
  'stadio': 'uno',
  'zio': 'uno',
  // una (feminine before consonant)
  'sedia': 'una',
  'finestra': 'una',
  'porta': 'una',
  'bicicletta': 'una',
  'chiave': 'una',
  'chiesa': 'una',
  'birra': 'una',
  'torta': 'una',
  'marmellata': 'una',
  'crema': 'una',
  'cena': 'una',
  'colazione': 'una',
  'fragola': 'una',
  'zucchina': 'una',
  'melanzana': 'una',
  // un' (feminine before vowel)
  'acqua': "un'",
  'arancia': "un'",
  'insalata': "un'",
  'uva': "un'",
  'idea': "un'",
  'ora': "un'",
  'estate': "un'"
};

// Vocabulary lists collection
export const vocabularyLists = {
  'List 0': vocabDict,
  'List 1': vocabDict1,
  'List 2': vocabDict2,
  'Numbers': vocabNumbers,
  'Essere': vocabDict3,
  'Avere': vocabDict4,
  'Verbi- are': vocabDict5,
  'Indefinite Articles': vocabIndefArticles
};

// Get vocabulary pairs from a specific list
export const getVocabPairs = listName => {
  const dict = vocabularyLists[listName] || vocabDict;
  return Object.entries(dict).map(([italian, english]) => ({
    italian,
    english
  }));
};

// Create reverse mapping for English to Italian
export const reverseVocabDict = Object.fromEntries(Object.entries(vocabDict).map(([italian, english]) => [english, italian]));

// Get all vocabulary pairs (backward compatibility)
export const getAllVocabPairs = () => {
  return Object.entries(vocabDict).map(([italian, english]) => ({
    italian,
    english
  }));
};

// Get list of available vocabulary lists
export const getAvailableLists = () => {
  return ['List 0', 'List 1', 'List 2', 'Numbers', 'Essere', 'Avere', 'Verbi- are', 'Indefinite Articles'];
};

// Get list of available grammar verb lists
export const getAvailableGrammarLists = () => {
  return ['Essere', 'Avere', 'Verbi- are', 'Indefinite Articles'];
};

// Map of list display names to their corresponding variables
export const listNameToVar = {
  'List 0': 'vocabDict',
  'List 1': 'vocabDict1',
  'List 2': 'vocabDict2',
  'Numbers': 'vocabNumbers',
  'Essere': 'vocabDict3',
  'Avere': 'vocabDict4',
  'Verbi- are': 'vocabDict5',
  'Indefinite Articles': 'vocabIndefArticles'
};

// Shuffle array utility
export const shuffleArray = array => {
  const shuffled = [...array];
  for (let i = shuffled.length - 1; i > 0; i--) {
    const j = Math.floor(Math.random() * (i + 1));
    [shuffled[i], shuffled[j]] = [shuffled[j], shuffled[i]];
  }
  return shuffled;
};

// List 4 - Avere conjugations
export const vocabDict4 = {
    'Io ho': 'I have',
    'Tu hai': 'You have (singular, informal)',
    'Lui/Lei ha': 'He/She has',
    'Noi abbiamo': 'We have',
    'Voi avete': 'You have (plural, formal)',
    'Loro hanno': 'They have'
};

// List 5 - Regular -ARE verb endings (Presente)
export const vocabDict5 = {
    'io': 'o',
    'tu': 'i',
    'lui/lei': 'a',
    'noi': 'iamo',
    'voi': 'ate',
    'loro': 'ano'
};

    // uno (masculine before s+consonant, z, gn, ps, pn, x, y)
    'studente': 'uno',

    'gnomo': 'uno',
    'xilofono': 'uno',

    // una (feminine before consonant)

// Vocabulary lists collection
export const vocabularyLists = {
    'List 0': vocabDict,
    'List 1': vocabDict1,
    'List 2': vocabDict2,
    'Numbers': vocabNumbers,
    'Essere': vocabDict3,
    'Avere': vocabDict4,
    'Verbi- are': vocabDict5,
    'Indefinite Articles': vocabIndefArticles
};

// Get vocabulary pairs from a specific list
export const getVocabPairs = (listName) => {
    const dict = vocabularyLists[listName] || vocabDict;
    return Object.entries(dict).map(([italian, english]) => ({
        italian,
        english
    }));
};

// Create reverse mapping for English to Italian
export const reverseVocabDict = Object.fromEntries(
    Object.entries(vocabDict).map(([italian, english]) => [english, italian])
);

// Get all vocabulary pairs (backward compatibility)
export const getAllVocabPairs = () => {
    return Object.entries(vocabDict).map(([italian, english]) => ({
        italian,
        english
    }));
};

// Get list of available vocabulary lists
export const getAvailableLists = () => {
    return ['List 0', 'List 1', 'List 2', 'Numbers', 'Essere', 'Avere', 'Verbi- are', 'Indefinite Articles'];
};

// Get list of available grammar verb lists
export const getAvailableGrammarLists = () => {
    return ['Essere', 'Avere', 'Verbi- are', 'Indefinite Articles'];
};

// Map of list display names to their corresponding variables
export const listNameToVar = {
    'List 0': 'vocabDict',
    'List 1': 'vocabDict1',
    'List 2': 'vocabDict2',
    'Numbers': 'vocabNumbers',
    'Essere': 'vocabDict3',
    'Avere': 'vocabDict4',
    'Verbi- are': 'vocabDict5',
    'Indefinite Articles': 'vocabIndefArticles'
};

// Shuffle array utility
export const shuffleArray = (array) => {
    const shuffled = [...array];
    for (let i = shuffled.length - 1; i > 0; i--) {
        const j = Math.floor(Math.random() * (i + 1));
        [shuffled[i], shuffled[j]] = [shuffled[j], shuffled[i]];
    }
    return shuffled;
};
